inputs.clip_l: ghibli style, isometric cozy village with cute robots, golden hour sunset, warm open layout, soft watercolor atmosphere
inputs.t5xxl: ghibli style, A beautiful wide isometric view of a spacious cozy AI agent village at golden hour sunset. Warm peach-to-purple sunset sky with soft clouds and distant purple mountains. The village has an open, spacious layout with wide dirt paths and plenty of green space between buildings. Five distinct zones visible: a small open-air stone shrine with a softly glowing teal flame at its center surrounded by sacred flowers (top-left), a purple stone observatory tower with a copper telescope dome (top-right), a warm central town square with a stone fountain and cobblestone paths (center), an amber wooden workshop with a smoking chimney and glowing windows (bottom-left), and a green ivy-covered library with arched windows and a warm lamp post (bottom-right). Lush green trees, flowering bushes, and softly glowing lanterns along winding paths. The village is populated by small cute ROBOTS - mechanical characters with round metal bodies, glowing circular LED eyes, antenna on their heads, articulated metal limbs, and colorful painted chassis. NOT humans. The robots are clearly mechanical and metallic with bolts and panel lines visible. Each robot has a unique bright color. Warm Ghibli-inspired sunset lighting with dappled golden sunlight, long soft purple shadows, and a sense of peaceful productivity. Stardew Valley meets Studio Ghibli aesthetic. Isometric 2:1 diamond grid perspective, top-down 30 degree angle.
